use_cases: Hero section backgrounds with animated particle effects
Landing pages requiring dynamic visual atmosphere
Visual effect overlays for applications and presentations
Generative art displays and creative backgrounds
ai_summary: A canvas-based particle animation system that renders configurable glowing particles with adjustable colors, sizes, velocities, and blend modes. Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth continuous animation and supports responsive sizing with device pixel ratio handling. Ideal for creating immersive hero backgrounds and dynamic visual effects in web applications.
